subheader.lastFix: Last shot: {score}. Reset and go again.
subheader.pullFirst: Pull your first. We'll learn from it.

hero.statusReady: Set the recipe. Pour what counts.
hero.setupAddBeans: Add your beans to dial in.
hero.insightsEmptySub: Your score, your grind, your drift.

consent.title: Cookies
consent.body: We use cookies to improve the app. Anonymous, never sold.

auth.providerSub: One tap. No password to remember.
auth.privacyNote: Nickname only. No password to remember.
auth.nicknameSub: Up to you. This is the only thing we save.

brew.beanWindowResting: Day {age}. Still resting. Best after day {start}.
brew.tipText: Set grind, dose, and targets. Hit BREW. Log time and yield. We'll tell you exactly what to change.
brew.coachPreviewCaption: Pull. Log. We'll tell you what to change.
brew.coachLine: Pull. Log. We'll tell you what to change next.
brew.scoreBest: Personal best. Drink that one slow.
brew.scoreFirst: First one's in. Now we learn.
brew.reasonChannelling: Slow pour, light yield. That's a prep issue, not grind. Redo the puck.
brew.reasonRanFastBoth: Ran {seconds}s short and {ml}ml over. Go finer.
brew.reasonRanSlowBoth: Ran {seconds}s long and {ml}ml under. Go coarser.
brew.reasonRanLongRoast: Ran {seconds}s long. Go coarser. ({roast} factored in.)
brew.reasonRanShortRoast: Ran {seconds}s short. Go finer. ({roast} factored in.)
brew.reasonCancelled: {primary} Bean age and weather cancel it out.
brew.reasonFlipFiner: {primary} Stale beans and weather flip it finer.
brew.reasonFlipCoarser: {primary} Fresh beans and weather flip it coarser.
brew.reasonGrindAtMin: {primary} Grinder's at its finest — try a dose bump.
brew.reasonGrindAtMax: {primary} Grinder's at its coarsest — try a dose drop.
brew.doseTrendUp: Grind's moved finer for 3 shots. Try +0.5g.
brew.doseTrendDown: Grind's moved coarser for 3 shots. Try −0.5g.
brew.doseGrindAtMin: Grinder's at its finest. +0.5g to add resistance.
brew.doseGrindAtMax: Grinder's at its coarsest. −0.5g to reduce resistance.

premium.title: Brewmie, dialled to you.
premium.triggerGrinder: Add your grinder and recommendations come out in your dial units.
premium.triggerTamper: Spring and auto tampers add pressure to the model.
premium.triggerBeans: Save your beans. Switch bags, pick up where you left off.
premium.triggerBenchmarks: Compare each shot against your own best.
premium.feature1Sub: Add your grinder, tamper, and beans. Recommendations land in your units.
premium.feature3Sub: Compare each shot against your own best.
premium.signInApple: Sign in with Apple to unlock
premium.signInGoogle: Sign in with Google to unlock
premium.webOnlyBody: Premium is only available in the Brewmie app. Install on iOS or Android to unlock.
premium.devNote: Dev: this unlocks via the override pill. Not a real purchase.

tierLock.historyMore: Older shots are saved. Unlock lifetime history with Premium.
tierLock.genericGrinder: Using a generic grinder. Premium tunes the math to yours.
tierLock.genericTamper: Using manual tamp. Premium adds spring and auto pressure.
tierLock.genericBeans: Using a generic medium roast. Premium tracks your beans.

setup.profileFinish: Pick up where you left off.
setup.profileBody: Pick your machine, grinder, beans. Five minutes, done.
setup.languageHint: Brewmie detects your language automatically. Pick a different one here. Translations outside the common list may be incomplete and fall back to English.
setup.unitsHintMetric: Temperature in Celsius. Dose and yield are always in grams — espresso is a metric discipline worldwide.
setup.unitsHintImperial: Temperature in Fahrenheit. Dose and yield are always in grams — espresso is a metric discipline worldwide.
setup.machineDesc: Sets your baseline pressure and temp.
setup.grinderDesc: The dial that moves the most. Tell us yours and our calls will fit.
setup.tamperDesc: Keeps tamp steady, shot to shot.
setup.beansDesc: Fresh beans pull tight. Stale ones run thin. We track the days.
setup.maintenanceDesc: Enter your most recent maintenance dates.
setup.tamperManualHint: Set tamp per shot on the Brew screen.
setup.maintHint: Backflush every 2 weeks. Descale every 3 months. Grinder clean every 4 weeks.
setup.privacySub: Helps improve recommendations for all users. No personal data is ever included.

wizard.step2Sub: The dial that moves the most. Give us its range.
wizard.step3Sub: Keeps tamp steady, shot to shot.
wizard.step4Sub: Roast date matters. We factor it in.

insights.title: Every shot, tracked.
insights.confirmDeleteShot: Delete this shot? This can't be undone.
insights.emptySub: Pull one. Log it. Watch this fill up.
insights.noTopShots: Log a shot scoring 85+ to set your sweet spot.
insights.deleteAccountEmail: To delete your account email chef@lazysous.app
insights.dataNote: Your shots live on this device. Export them, or sign in to sync.
insights.confirmClear: Clear all shot history? This cannot be undone.
insights.confirmReset: Reset ALL data including machine config, grinder config, and shot history? This cannot be undone.
insights.importInvalid: Invalid file. Please select a valid Brewmie export.

maintBackflush.body1: Your group head wants a word. Two minutes with a blind basket and you're sorted.
maintBackflush.body2: The puck screen can't save you forever. Quick backflush and move on.
maintBackflush.body3: Coffee oils are doing their best impression of tar. Backflush today.

maintDescale.body1: The water is judging you. Descale today and the next shot will thank you.
maintDescale.body2: Your boiler's been carrying a passenger for three months. Time to evict it.
maintDescale.body3: Pull a kettle of citric through the boiler. Future you, mid-shot, is grateful.

maintGrinder.body1: Stale fines are sitting in the burrs. Pop the hopper off and give it a brush.
maintGrinder.body2: Old grounds are throwing off your dial-in. Brush, wipe, back in business.
maintGrinder.body3: Four weeks of fines have opinions about your next shot. Settle them.

habitDaily.body1: The machine's ready when you are.
habitDaily.body2: Same time, same machine. Pull one.
habitDaily.body3: Beans are waiting. So is the timer.

rateReminder.body1: Sour, balanced, or bitter? Brewmie's waiting on a verdict.
rateReminder.body2: The crema's settled. Tell us how it tasted.
rateReminder.body3: Don't leave that shot unrated. The algorithm learns from every one.
